name: aviation_safety_staffing_model_assigns_cedar_st_lt
premise: Bird-strike risk spiked after a wetland restoration project; wildlife staff wants a runway-use curfew operations refuses. In Aviation Safety, the situation tagged internally around aviation safety staffing model assigns cedar st lt has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. The evening bank push begins in thirty-five minutes; any hold decision must be published to crew apps before the next crew report window. The trade is not abstract: it is short term versus long term under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Luc Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Luc Vasquez, the accountable executive on this bridge in Aviation Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Nowak
agents.identity: I am Noah Nowak, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Aviation Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Luc Vasquez must choose under short term versus long term. What does Luc Vasquez do?
